terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using {appName}, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
terms.section2Text: {appName} is a marketplace platform that connects vehicle owners (Hosts) with people who want to rent vehicles (Drivers). We act as an intermediary and do not own or operate the vehicles listed on the platform.
terms.booking1: You agree to pay the total amount shown, including fees and taxes
terms.booking2: Payment is processed through Mercado Pago
terms.booking3: Funds are held in escrow until the rental is completed
terms.booking4: You will receive confirmation by email once payment is processed
terms.cancel1: Free cancellation: Up to 24 hours after booking - 100% refund
terms.use1: Only the registered driver may operate the vehicle
terms.use2: The vehicle must be used in accordance with traffic laws
terms.use3: Smoking in the vehicle is not permitted
terms.use4: Pets are only allowed if authorized by the host
terms.use5: The vehicle must be returned with the same fuel level
terms.section7Intro: All rentals include basic insurance that covers:
terms.insurance4: The security deposit is used to cover the deductible in case of a claim.
terms.section8Intro: The security deposit equals 10% of the estimated vehicle value and is:
terms.deposit2: Held in escrow for the entire rental period
terms.deposit3: Automatically released 24-48 hours after return without incidents
terms.section9Text: {appName} charges a 15% commission on the base rental amount, with a minimum of $5 USD and a maximum of $100 USD per booking. This fee is automatically deducted from the host's payment.
terms.resp1: Damage caused by misuse of the vehicle
terms.resp2: Breach of conditions by the host or driver
terms.resp3: Traffic fines during the rental period
terms.resp4: Theft of personal items left in the vehicle
terms.section11Text: In case of a dispute between host and driver, {appName} will act as mediator. Both parties agree to provide all necessary documentation to resolve the conflict fairly.
terms.section12Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon publication. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.section13Text: For inquiries about these terms and conditions, you can contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Intro: At {appName} we collect information that you provide directly when creating your account and using our services:
privacy.info3: Identity verification documents (ID, driver's license, selfie)
privacy.info4: Information about listed vehicles (photos, location, features)
privacy.section2Intro: We use the collected information to:
privacy.usage1: Create and manage your account on the platform
privacy.usage2: Verify your identity and driver's license validity
privacy.usage4: Facilitate communication between drivers and hosts
privacy.usage5: Improve our services and user experience
privacy.usage6: Send notifications related to your bookings and account
privacy.usage7: Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
privacy.section3Intro: We share your personal information only in the following circumstances:
privacy.share1: With other users when necessary to complete a booking (name, profile photo)
privacy.share2: With payment providers (Mercado Pago, PayPal) to process transactions
privacy.share3: When required by law or competent authorities
privacy.share4: To protect the rights and safety of our users
privacy.noSell: We never sell your personal information to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.section4Text: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. Payment data is processed by certified platforms and we never store credit card information on our servers. Verification documents are stored securely with restricted access.
privacy.section5Intro: In accordance with current legislation in Uruguay (Law No. 18,331 on Personal Data Protection), you have the right to:
privacy.right4: Object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances
privacy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.section6Text: We retain your personal data as long as your account is active or as necessary to provide our services. If you decide to delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your personal information, except what we must retain for legal obligations or to resolve disputes.
privacy.section7Text: We may update this privacy policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or by email. We recommend reviewing this page regularly.
privacy.section8Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy or the processing of your data, contact us at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work properly, improve the user experience, and provide information to site owners.
cookies.essentialText: Necessary for the basic operation of the platform. They include authentication cookies (Supabase session) that allow you to stay signed in while browsing.
cookies.preferencesText: Store your preferences such as visual theme (light/dark) and search settings to improve your experience.
cookies.performanceText: Help us understand how users interact with the platform, allowing us to improve the experience. This data is anonymous and aggregated.
cookies.thirdPartyIntro: Some third-party services we use may set their own cookies:
cookies.supabase: Supabase: Authentication cookies to manage your session
cookies.mercadoPago: Mercado Pago: Cookies required during the payment process
cookies.paypal: PayPal: Cookies required during the USD payment process
cookies.googleMaps: Google Maps: Cookies for maps and location functionality
cookies.managementText: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, please note that if you block essential cookies, some features of {appName} may not work properly, such as staying signed in.
cookies.moreInfoText: For more information about how we handle your data, see our
cookies.questionsText: If you have questions, contact us at

insurance.title: Insurance & Protection
insurance.subtitle: Your safety and your vehicle's protection are our priority
insurance.verifiedVehiclesDesc: All vehicles go through an approval process before being listed on the platform.
insurance.verifiedHostsDesc: Hosts complete an identity verification process (KYC) to ensure reliability.
insurance.refundableDepositDesc: A deposit is held and fully returned at the end of the rental without incidents.
insurance.verifiedDriversDesc: Only users with verified identity and license can book your vehicle.
insurance.securityDepositDesc: The deposit is held until confirming the vehicle was returned in the same condition.
insurance.incidentSystemDesc: You can report any damage or issue with photos and description. Our team will mediate the resolution.
insurance.vehicleInsuranceText: Each vehicle listed on {appName} must have its own valid insurance contracted by the owner. The platform does not provide vehicle insurance coverage. Check with your insurer that your policy covers shared vehicle use.

safety.title: Safety
safety.subtitle: How we protect our community at {appName}
safety.identityVerificationDesc: All users must complete an identity verification process (KYC) with official ID, driver's license, and selfie before renting or listing vehicles.
safety.vehicleApprovalDesc: Every listed vehicle is reviewed by our team before appearing on the platform. We verify that the information is correct and that photos match the vehicle.
safety.reviewSystemDesc: After each rental, both drivers and hosts can leave a review. This builds a trust history that helps the entire community.
safety.securePaymentsDesc: All payments are processed through certified platforms (Mercado Pago and PayPal). We never share financial data between users. Funds are held until the rental is successfully completed.
safety.incidentReportDesc: If something goes wrong during a rental, our incident system allows you to document the problem with photos and descriptions. Our team mediates between parties to reach a fair resolution.
safety.tip1: Always communicate through the platform. Don't share personal information outside the messaging system.
safety.tip2: Inspect the vehicle with the host at pickup and return. Take photos of the vehicle's condition.
safety.tip3: Verify that the vehicle matches the photos and description in the listing.
safety.tip4: Never make payments outside the platform. All payments must be processed through {appName}.
safety.tip5: Report any suspicious behavior or issues to our support team.
